name: @coco-share/coco-blue
author: Rik He
description: Install Agent Skills from coco-green (coco-blue client).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsup src/cli.ts --format esm --platform node --target node20 --out-dir dist --clean --sourcemap && pnpm run build:post
scripts.build:post: shx cp ../../README.md README.md && shx cp ../../logo.svg logo.svg
